sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38151" key="e)panatolh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπανα-τολή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, invisible <sense id="n38151.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rising</tr_> of stars just <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">after</tr_> sunrise or sunset, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Alm.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
